  position: fixed;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  z-index: 1300;
}
.xmail-ui-toast .ui-toast-mask {
  position: fixed;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  top: 0;
  bottom: 0;
}
.xmail-ui-toast .ui-toast-body {
  cursor: default;
  position: fixed;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  bottom: 20%;
  margin: 0 auto;
  width: -webkit-fit-content;
  width: -moz-fit-content;
  width: fit-content;
  max-width: calc(100% - 32px);
  display: -webkit-box;
  display: -ms-flexbox;
  display: flex;
  -webkit-box-align: center;
      -ms-flex-align: center;
          align-items: center;
  -webkit-box-pack: center;
      -ms-flex-pack: center;
          justify-content: center;
  -webkit-user-select: none;
     -moz-user-select: none;
      -ms-user-select: none;
          user-select: none;
  border-radius: 6px;
  padding: 20px;
  -webkit-box-sizing: border-box;
          box-sizing: border-box;
  background: var(--base_gray_100);
}
.xmail-ui-toast .ui-toast-opening {
  -webkit-animation: xmail-ui-toast-opening-keyframes 0.2s forwards;
          animation: xmail-ui-toast-opening-keyframes 0.2s forwards;
}
.xmail-ui-toast .ui-toast-closing {
  -webkit-animation: xmail-ui-toast-closing-keyframes 0.2s forwards;
          animation: xmail-ui-toast-closing-keyframes 0.2s forwards;
}
.xmail-ui-toast .ui-toast-msg {
  font-size: 16px;
  line-height: 22px;
  font-weight: initial;
  color: var(--base_white_100);
}
.xmail-ui-toast .ui-toast-link-btn {
  display: -webkit-inline-box;
  display: -ms-inline-flexbox;
  display: inline-flex;
  -webkit-box-align: center;
      -ms-flex-align: center;
          align-items: center;
  height: 32px;
  min-width: 32px;
  color: var(--theme_lighten_2);
  border-radius: 4px;
  padding: 0 8px;
  -webkit-box-sizing: border-box;
          box-sizing: border-box;
  margin-left: 16px;
}
.xmail-ui-toast .ui-toast-link-btn:hover {
  background: var(--base_white_010);
}
.xmail-ui-toast .ui-toast-link-btn:active {
  background: var(--base_white_020);
}
@-webkit-keyframes xmail-ui-toast-opening-keyframes {
  from {
    opacity: 0;
    -webkit-transform: translate3d(0, 50%, 0);
            transform: translate3d(0, 50%, 0);
  }
  to {
    opacity: 1;
    -webkit-transform: translate3d(0, 0, 0);
            transform: translate3d(0, 0, 0);
  }
}
@keyframes xmail-ui-toast-opening-keyframes {
  from {
    opacity: 0;
    -webkit-transform: translate3d(0, 50%, 0);
            transform: translate3d(0, 50%, 0);
  }
  to {
    opacity: 1;
    -webkit-transform: translate3d(0, 0, 0);

  }
}
@-webkit-keyframes xmail-ui-toast-closing-keyframes {
  from {
    opacity: 1;
    -webkit-transform: translate3d(0, 0, 0);
            transform: translate3d(0, 0, 0);
  }
  to {
    opacity: 0;

            transform: translate3d(0, 50%, 0);

}
@keyframes xmail-ui-toast-closing-keyframes {

  }
  to {
    opacity: 0;

}

            transform: rotate(360deg);

}
</style><style>.xmail-ui-tooltip {
  position: fixed;

  left: 0;
  right: 10px;

.xmail-ui-tooltip-bubble {

  max-width: 80%;

          box-sizing: border-box;

}
.xmail-ui-tooltip-bubble .ui-tooltip-top-arrow,
.xmail-ui-tooltip-bubble .ui-tooltip-bottom-arrow {

  height: 11px;

}
.xmail-ui-tooltip-bubble .ui-tooltip-top-arrow.ui-tooltip-top-arrow,
.xmail-ui-tooltip-bubble .ui-tooltip-bottom-arrow.ui-tooltip-top-arrow {
  bottom: calc(100% - 5px);
  -webkit-transform: rotate(45deg);
          transform: rotate(45deg);
}
.xmail-ui-tooltip-bubble .ui-tooltip-top-arrow.ui-tooltip-bottom-arrow,
.xmail-ui-tooltip-bubble .ui-tooltip-bottom-arrow.ui-tooltip-bottom-arrow {
  top: calc(100% - 5px);
  -webkit-transform: rotate(-135deg);
          transform: rotate(-135deg);
}
.xmail-ui-tooltip-bubble .ui-tooltip-text {
  white-space: pre;
  max-width: 300px;
}
.xmail-ui-tooltip-bubble .ui-tooltip-text.ui-tooltip-auto-wrap {
  padding: 4px;
  -webkit-box-sizing: border-box;
          box-sizing: border-box;
  white-space: pre-wrap;
  word-break: break-word;
}
@-webkit-keyframes xmail-ui-toast-animation {
  0% {
    opacity: 0;
  }
  100% {
    opacity: 1;
  }
}
@keyframes xmail-ui-toast-animation {

    opacity: 0;
  }
  100% {
    opacity: 1;
  }
}

</style><style>.xmail-ui-btn {
  --base-bg: transparent;

}

  content: '';

  left: 0;
  right: 0;

  --material_castshadow_3: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(19, 24, 29, 0.36);
  --material_castshadow_4: 0 2px 3px 0 rgba(19, 24, 29, 0.38);
  --material_castshadow_5: 0 2px 4px 0 rgba(19, 24, 29, 0.4);
  --material_BlueButton_ExtraSmall: 0 1px 2px 0 var(--base_white_010) inset, 0 1px 2px 0 var(--theme_alpha_025);
  --material_BlueButton_Small: 0 1px 2px 0 var(--base_white_015) inset, 0 1px 2px 0 var(--theme_alpha_030);
  --material_BlueButton_Medium: 0 2px 2px 0 var(--base_white_015) inset, 0 1px 2px 0 var(--theme_alpha_030);
  --material_BlueButton_Large: 0 2px 2px 0 var(--base_white_020) inset, 0 2px 3px 0 var(--theme_alpha_040);
  --material_BlueButton_ExtraLarge: 0 2px 4px 0 var(--base_white_020) inset, 0 2px 4px 0 var(--theme_alpha_040);
  --material_compose_default: 0 2px 4px 0 var(--base_white_020) inset, 0 2px 4px 0 var(--accent_blue_alpha_040);
  --material_compose_white: 0 2px 4px 0 var(--base_white_020, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2)) inset, 0 2px 4px 0 rgba(19, 24, 29, 0.12);
  --material_panel: 0 1px 2px 0 #FFF inset;
  --material_compose_SpringFestival: 0 2px 4px 0 rgba(196, 73, 44, 0.12);
  --material_compose_TheBeginningofSummer: 0 2px 4px 0 rgba(0, 160, 248, 0.2);
  --shadow_VipMainPage: 0 -4px 15px 0 rgba(128, 114, 243, 0.03);
  --material_VipButton_ExtraSmall: 0 1px 2px 0 var(--base_white_010) inset, 0 1px 2px 0 var(--vip_alpha_025);
  --material_VipButton_Small: 0 1px 2px 0 var(--base_white_015) inset, 0 1px 2px 0 var(--vip_alpha_030);
  --material_VipButton_Medium: 0 2px 2px 0 var(--base_white_015) inset, 0 1px 2px 0 var(--vip_alpha_030);
  --material_VipButton_Large: 0 2px 2px 0 var(--base_white_020) inset, 0 2px 3px 0 var(--vip_alpha_040);
  --material_VipButton_ExtraLarge: 0 2px 4px 0 var(--base_white_020) inset, 0 2px 4px 0 var(--vip_alpha_040);
  --theme_primary: var(--accent_blue);
  --theme_darken_1: var(--accent_blue_darken_1);
  --theme_darken_2: var(--accent_blue_darken_2);
  --theme_darken_3: var(--accent_blue_darken_3);
  --theme_darken_4: var(--accent_blue_darken_4);
  --theme_darken_5: var(--accent_blue_darken_5);
  --theme_lighten_1: var(--accent_blue_lighten_1);
  --theme_lighten_2: var(--accent_blue_lighten_2);
  --theme_lighten_3: var(--accent_blue_lighten_3);
  --theme_lighten_3l: var(--accent_blue_lighten_3l);
  --theme_lighten_4: var(--accent_blue_lighten_4);
  --theme_lighten_4l: var(--accent_blue_lighten_4l);
  --theme_lighten_5: var(--accent_blue_lighten_5);
  --theme_alpha_005: var(--accent_blue_alpha_005);
  --theme_alpha_010: var(--accent_blue_alpha_010);
  --theme_alpha_015: var(--accent_blue_alpha_015);
  --theme_alpha_020: var(--accent_blue_alpha_020);
  --theme_alpha_025: var(--accent_blue_alpha_025);
  --theme_alpha_030: var(--accent_blue_alpha_030);
  --theme_alpha_040: var(--accent_blue_alpha_040);
  --theme_alpha_050: var(--accent_blue_alpha_050);
  --theme_alpha_060: var(--accent_blue_alpha_060);
  --theme_alpha_070: var(--accent_blue_alpha_070);
  --theme_alpha_080: var(--accent_blue_alpha_080);
  --theme_alpha_090: var(--accent_blue_alpha_090);
  --color-scroll-bar-bg: var(--base_gray_020);
  --color-scroll-bar-hover-bg: var(--base_gray_050);
  --color-scroll-bar-active-bg: var(--base_gray_060);
  font-size: 14px;
  line-height: 20px;
  font-weight: initial;
  color: var(--base_black);
  font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei UI", "Microsoft YaHei", "Source Han Sans CN", "Noto Sans CJK SC", sans-serif;
  word-break: break-word;
  background: transparent !important;
  overflow: hidden;
}

body::-webkit-scrollbar {
  width: 12px;
  height: 12px;
}
body::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
  background: transparent;
}
body::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
  border: 2px solid transparent;
  -webkit-box-sizing: border-box;
          box-sizing: border-box;
  background-color: var(--color-scroll-bar-bg);
  background-clip: content-box;
  border-radius: calc(12px / 2);
}
body::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
  background-color: var(--color-scroll-bar-hover-bg);
}
body::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:active {
  background-color: var(--color-scroll-bar-active-bg);
}
body *::-webkit-scrollbar {
  width: 12px;
  height: 12px;
}
body *::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
  background: transparent;
}
body *::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
  border: 2px solid transparent;
  -webkit-box-sizing: border-box;
          box-sizing: border-box;
  background-color: var(--color-scroll-bar-bg);
  background-clip: content-box;
  border-radius: calc(12px / 2);
}
body *::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
  background-color: var(--color-scroll-bar-hover-bg);
}
body *::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:active {
  background-color: var(--color-scroll-bar-active-bg);
}
body a {
  color: var(--accent_blue_darken_1);
}
body a:visited {
  color: var(--accent_blue_darken_1);
}
body a:hover {
  color: var(--accent_blue_lighten_1);
}
body a:active {
  color: var(--accent_blue_lighten_2);
}
body input,
body textarea {
  font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei UI", "Microsoft YaHei", "Source Han Sans CN", "Noto Sans CJK SC", sans-serif;
}
body :focus {
  outline: none;
}
#mailMainApp {
  display: -webkit-box;
  display: -ms-flexbox;
  display: flex;
  -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
  -webkit-box-direction: normal;
      -ms-flex-direction: column;
          flex-direction: column;
  height: 100%;
  overflow: auto;
}
.frame-body,
.frame-header {
  min-width: 820px;
}
.frame-body {
  -webkit-box-flex: 1;
      -ms-flex-positive: 1;
          flex-grow: 1;
  display: -webkit-box;
  display: -ms-flexbox;
  display: flex;
  height: 100%;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.frame-body.frame-body-show-header {
  height: calc(100% - 60px);
}
.frame-body.frame-body-single-page .frame-route-content {
  border-radius: 0;
  margin-right: 0;
}
.frame-body .frame-sidebar,
.frame-body .frame-route-content {
  height: 100%;
}
.frame-route-content {
  -webkit-box-flex: 1;
      -ms-flex-positive: 1;
          flex-grow: 1;
  position: relative;
  border-radius: 12px 12px 0 0;
  -webkit-box-sizing: border-box;
          box-sizing: border-box;
  overflow: hidden;
  margin-right: 16px;
}
.frame-route-content::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  top: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  background: var(--bg_white_web);
}
.frame-route-content .mail_app {
  position: relative;
  height: 100%;
}
@media print {
  html,
  body {
    height: auto;
    overflow: visible;
    print-color-adjust: exact;
    -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact;
  }
  .frame-body,
  .frame-header {
    min-width: auto;
    overflow: visible;
  }
  .frame-route-content {
    background: initial;
  }
  * {
    scrollbar-width: none;
    -ms-overflow-style: none;
  }
  *::-webkit-scrollbar {
    display: none;
  }
}

.frame-theme-layer-base .frame-theme-bg-header,

}
.frame-theme-layer-base .frame-theme-bg-header::after,

}
.frame-theme-layer-base .frame-theme-bg-body,

  display: -ms-flexbox;
  display: flex;
  -webkit-box-align: center;
      -ms-flex-align: center;
          align-items: center;

.frame-theme-layer-base .frame-theme-bg-sidebar,
.frame-theme-layer-overlay .frame-theme-bg-sidebar,
.frame-theme-layer-festive .frame-theme-bg-sidebar {

.frame-theme-layer-base .frame-theme-bg-route-content,

#_Table_Resizer {
  z-index: 1100;
  cursor: nwse-resize !important;
  width: 16px !important;
  height: 16px !important;
  border: none !important;
  margin: -8px 0 0 -8px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  overflow: hidden;
  background-image: url(https://res.wx.qq.com/t/webmail/webmail/res/static/images/mail/web/components/XmailEditor/icons/resizer.7b51432.svg);
  background-size: 100% 100%;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
}
#_Table_Resizer:hover {
  background-image: url(https://res.wx.qq.com/t/webmail/webmail/res/static/images/mail/web/components/XmailEditor/icons/resizer-hover.0007696.svg);
}
#_Table_Mover {
  z-index: 1100;
  width: 24px !important;
  height: 24px !important;
  border: none !important;
  margin: 2px 0 0 3px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  overflow: hidden;
  background-image: url(https://res.wx.qq.com/t/webmail/webmail/res/static/images/mail/web/components/XmailEditor/icons/mover.6448c49.svg);
  background-size: 100% 100%;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
}
#verticalResizer,
#horizontalResizer {
  z-index: 1100;
}
#verticalResizer:hover,
#horizontalResizer:hover {
  background: var(--accent_blue);
}
#verticalInserter,
#horizontalInserter {
  z-index: 1100;
  font-size: 0 !important;
  border: none !important;
  line-height: 0 !important;
  color: transparent !important;
  background-color: transparent !important;
}
#verticalInserter#verticalInserter,
#horizontalInserter#verticalInserter {
  margin-left: 1px;
}
#verticalInserter#verticalInserter::before,
#horizontalInserter#verticalInserter::before {
  margin: 0 -1px -4px 0;
}
#verticalInserter#horizontalInserter::before,
#horizontalInserter#horizontalInserter::before {
  margin: -1px -4px 0 0;
}
#verticalInserter::before,
#horizontalInserter::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  top: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  background-image: url(https://res.wx.qq.com/t/webmail/webmail/res/static/images/mail/web/components/XmailEditor/icons/inserter.8a35084.svg);
  background-size: 100% 100%;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
}
#verticalInserter:hover::before,
#horizontalInserter:hover::before {
  background-image: url(https://res.wx.qq.com/t/webmail/webmail/res/static/images/mail/web/components/XmailEditor/icons/inserter-hover.9d1a2bb.svg);
}
#verticalInserter > div,
#horizontalInserter > div {
  border-left: none !important;
  border-right: none !important;
  border-top: none !important;
  border-bottom: none !important;
  background-color: var(--accent_blue) !important;
}

  --bg: transparent;
  --hover-bg: var(--base_gray_005);
  --active-bg: var(--theme_lighten_4l);

  border-radius: 6px;
}
.contact-page-item::before {
  content: "";

  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  top: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  border-radius: 6px;

.calendar-page {
  font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Ubuntu, "Helvetica Neue", Helevetica, Arial, "PingFang SC", "Hiragino Sans GB", "Microsoft YaHei UI", "Microsoft YaHei", "Source Han Sans CN", sans-serif;

  overflow: hidden;
}
.calendar-page dd,
.calendar-page dl,
.calendar-page fieldset,
.calendar-page form,
.calendar-page h1,
.calendar-page h2,
.calendar-page h3,
.calendar-page h4,
.calendar-page h5,
.calendar-page h6,
.calendar-page legend,
.calendar-page p,
.calendar-page pre {
  margin: 0;
}
.calendar-page * {
  -webkit-box-sizing: border-box;
          box-sizing: border-box;
  background-size: 100% 100%;
}
.calendar-page * ::before,
.calendar-page * ::after {
  background-size: 100% 100%;
}
</style><style>.calendar-container {
  font-size: 13px;
  color: var(--base_gray_060);
  background: var(--bg_white_web);
  height: 100%;
  min-width: 684px;
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;
  display: -webkit-box;
  display: -ms-flexbox;
  display: flex;
  -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
  -webkit-box-direction: normal;
      -ms-flex-direction: column;
          flex-direction: column;
  overflow: hidden;

</style><style>.note-page-item {
  --bg: transparent;
  --hover-bg: var(--base_gray_005);
  --active-bg: var(--theme_lighten_4l);
  --border-color: transparent;
  display: -webkit-box;
  display: -ms-flexbox;
  display: flex;
  -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
  -webkit-box-direction: normal;
      -ms-flex-direction: column;
          flex-direction: column;
  -webkit-box-pack: center;
      -ms-flex-pack: center;
          justify-content: center;
  cursor: pointer;
  height: 64px;
  background: var(--bg);
  border-radius: 6px;
}
.note-page-item::after {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  left: 8px;
  right: 8px;
  bottom: -0.5px;
  height: 1px;
  background: var(--base_gray_007);
}
.note-page-item::before {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  top: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  border-radius: 6px;
  border: 2px solid var(--border-color);
  pointer-events: none;
}
.note-page-item.note-item-show-border {
  --border-color: var(--theme_primary);
}
.note-page-item.note-item-not-star .note-list-td-star {
  visibility: hidden;
}
.note-page-item.note-item-not-star:hover .note-list-td-star {
  visibility: visible;
}
.note-page-item.note-item-checked {
  --bg: var(--theme_alpha_015);
  --hover-bg: var(--theme_alpha_020);
  --active-bg: var(--theme_alpha_025);
}
.note-page-item.note-item-prev-checked,
.note-page-item.note-item-prev-checked::before {
  border-top-left-radius: 0;
  border-top-right-radius: 0;
  border-top: none;
}
.note-page-item.note-item-next-checked,
.note-page-item.note-item-next-checked::before {
  border-bottom-left-radius: 0;
  border-bottom-right-radius: 0;
  border-bottom: none;
}
.note-page-item.note-list-selecting:hover,
.note-page-item.note-list-selecting:active {
  background: var(--bg) !important;
}
.note-page-item.note-list-selecting * {
  pointer-events: none;
}
.note-page-item:hover {
  background: var(--hover-bg);
}
.note-page-item:not(.note-item-sub-pressed):active {
  background: var(--active-bg);
}
.note-page-item .note-info-line {
  display: -webkit-box;
  display: -ms-flexbox;
  display: flex;
  -webkit-box-align: center;
      -ms-flex-align: center;
          align-items: center;
}

  background: var(--bg_white_web);
  -webkit-box-shadow: 0 2px 9px 0 var(--base_gray_005);

}
.read-subscribe-home-content .banner-head {
  display: -webkit-box;
  display: -ms-flexbox;
  display: flex;
  -webkit-box-pack: justify;
      -ms-flex-pack: justify;
          justify-content: space-between;
  -webkit-box-align: center;
      -ms-flex-align: center;
          align-items: center;
  margin-bottom: 18px;
}
.read-subscribe-home-content .banner-head > h2 {
  font-size: 16px;
  color: var(--base_gray_100);
  line-height: 24px;
  font-weight: 500;
}
.read-subscribe-home-content .banner-head .more-banner-btn {

}
.read-subscribe-home-content .banner-content {
  display: -webkit-box;
  display: -ms-flexbox;
  display: flex;
  -webkit-box-pack: justify;
      -ms-flex-pack: justify;
          justify-content: space-between;
}
.read-subscribe-home-content .banner-content-left {
  position: relative;
  cursor: pointer;
  overflow: hidden;
  border-radius: 4px;
}
.read-subscribe-home-content .banner-content-left > div {
  -webkit-transition: all 0.4s;
  transition: all 0.4s;
  background-image: -webkit-gradient(linear, left top, left bottom, from(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5)), to(#000000));
  background-image: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5) 0%, #000000 100%);
  opacity: 0.5;
  height: 360px;
  width: 100%;
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
}
.read-subscribe-home-content .banner-content-left > div:hover {
  -webkit-transition: all 0.4s;
  transition: all 0.4s;
  opacity: 0.75;
}
.read-subscribe-home-content .banner-content-left > h2 {
  position: absolute;
  font-size: 19px;
  color: var(--bg_white_web);
  line-height: 32px;
  font-weight: 500;
  margin: 0 20px;
  bottom: 120px;
  z-index: 1;
}
.read-subscribe-home-content .banner-content-left > h2:hover ~ div {
  -webkit-transition: all 0.4s;
  transition: all 0.4s;
  opacity: 0.75;
}
.read-subscribe-home-content .banner-content-left > p {
  position: absolute;

  opacity: 0.7;
  font-size: 12px;
  color: var(--bg_white_web);
  line-height: 19px;
  -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
  -webkit-box-direction: normal;
      -ms-flex-direction: column;

  display: -moz-box;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  -webkit-line-clamp: 3;
  -moz-line-clamp: 3;
  line-clamp: 3;
  box-orient: vertical;
  z-index: 1;
}

  -webkit-transition: all 0.4s;
  transition: all 0.4s;
  opacity: 0.75;
}
.read-subscribe-home-content .banner-content-right {
  display: -webkit-box;
  display: -ms-flexbox;
  display: flex;
  -webkit-box-pack: justify;
      -ms-flex-pack: justify;
          justify-content: space-between;
  -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
  -webkit-box-direction: normal;
      -ms-flex-direction: column;
          flex-direction: column;
  cursor: pointer;
}
.read-subscribe-home-content .banner-content-right > div {
  position: relative;

  width: 100%;

  -o-object-fit: cover;

}
.read-subscribe-home-content .banner-content-right > div > div {
  -webkit-transition: all 0.4s;
  transition: all 0.4s;
  background-image: -webkit-gradient(linear, left top, left bottom, from(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5)), to(#000000));
  background-image: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5) 0%, #000000 100%);

</style><style>.read-subscribe-home-content-tag {

  -webkit-box-pack: justify;

          justify-content: space-between;

          align-items: center;

  display: -ms-flexbox;
  display: flex;
  position: absolute;

</style><style>.read-subscribe-home-content-topic {
  border-radius: 5px;
  padding: 30px;
  margin: 35px 0 0 -30px;

</style><style>.read-subscribe-banner-page {

}

  position: relative;
  padding-top: 50px;
  margin-top: 30px;
}

  margin: 30px 20px 0;
}

  opacity: 0.85;
  font-family: Georgia;
  font-size: 22px;
  color: var(--base_gray_100);
  width: 100%;
  margin-bottom: 15px;
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
}
.read-subscribe-banner-page .banner-info-single {
  width: 360px;
  height: 360px;
  position: relative;
  cursor: pointer;
  border-radius: 4px;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.read-subscribe-banner-page .banner-info-single > img {
  width: 360px;
  height: 360px;
}
.read-subscribe-banner-page .banner-info-single-cover {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  height: 360px;
  width: 360px;
}
.read-subscribe-banner-page .banner-info-single-cover h2 {
  font-size: 20px;
  color: var(--base_white_100);
  line-height: 33px;
  font-weight: 500;
  position: absolute;
  top: 40px;
  width: 320px;
  left: 20px;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  display: -webkit-box;
  -webkit-line-clamp: 2;
  height: 66px;
  z-index: 1;
}
.read-subscribe-banner-page .banner-info-single-cover h2:hover ~ div {
  -webkit-transition: all 0.4s;
  transition: all 0.4s;
  opacity: 0.75;
}
.read-subscribe-banner-page .banner-info-single-cover > p {
  opacity: 0.5;
  font-size: 13px;
  color: var(--base_white_100);
  line-height: 19px;
  position: absolute;
  left: 20px;
  width: 320px;
  top: 120px;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  display: -webkit-box;
  -webkit-line-clamp: 4;
  -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
  z-index: 1;
}
.read-subscribe-banner-page .banner-info-single-cover > p:hover ~ div {
  -webkit-transition: all 0.4s;
  transition: all 0.4s;
  opacity: 0.75;
}
.read-subscribe-banner-page .banner-info-single-cover-shadow {
  -webkit-transition: all 0.4s;
  transition: all 0.4s;
  background-image: -webkit-gradient(linear, left top, left bottom, from(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5)), to(#000000));
  background-image: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5) 0%, #000000 100%);
  opacity: 0.5;
  top: 0;
  position: absolute;
  left: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
}
.read-subscribe-banner-page .banner-info-single-cover-shadow:hover {
  -webkit-transition: all 0.4s;
  transition: all 0.4s;
  opacity: 0.75;
}

  left: 20px;
  position: absolute;
  bottom: 30px;
  display: -webkit-box;
  display: -ms-flexbox;
  display: flex;
  -webkit-box-align: center;
      -ms-flex-align: center;
          align-items: center;

}

  height: 2px;

  transition: left 0.2s ease, -webkit-transform 0.2s ease;
  transition: left 0.2s ease, transform 0.2s ease;

.resume_preview_baseinfo {
  display: -webkit-box;
  display: -ms-flexbox;
  display: flex;
  -webkit-box-pack: justify;
      -ms-flex-pack: justify;
          justify-content: space-between;
  border-radius: 4px;
  cursor: pointer;
}
.resume_preview_baseinfo_detail {
  display: -webkit-box;
  display: -ms-flexbox;
  display: flex;
  -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
  -webkit-box-direction: normal;
      -ms-flex-direction: column;
          flex-direction: column;
  -webkit-box-pack: center;
      -ms-flex-pack: center;
          justify-content: center;
}
.resume_preview_baseinfo_title {
  margin: 0 30px 10px 0;
  font-size: 20px;
  font-weight: bold;
  letter-spacing: 0;
  word-break: break-all;
}
.resume_preview_baseinfo_desc {
  font-size: 14px;
  letter-spacing: 0;
}
.resume_preview_baseinfo_desc i {
  font-style: normal;
}
.resume_preview_baseinfo_contact {
  font-size: 14px;
  letter-spacing: 0;
}
.resume_preview_baseinfo_contact > span {
  margin-right: 15px;
}
.resume_preview_baseinfo_position {
  font-size: 14px;
  letter-spacing: 0;
}
.resume_preview_baseinfo_avatar {
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  width: 94px;
  height: 124px;
  text-align: center;
  background: var(--bg_gray_web_3);
  border: 1px solid var(--base_gray_007);
  -webkit-box-sizing: content-box;
          box-sizing: content-box;
  border-radius: 3px;
  cursor: pointer;
}
.resume_preview_baseinfo_avatar > img {
  width: 94px;
}
.resume_preview_baseinfo_avatar > input {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  cursor: pointer;
  opacity: 0;
}
.resume_preview_baseinfo_avatar_default {
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  display: inline-block;
  width: 50px;
  height: 48px;
  margin: -24px 0 0 -25px;
  background: url("data:image/png;base64,") no-repeat;
  background-size: contain;
}

}
.resume-base-dialog .special-input-height > textarea {
  resize: none;
}
.resume-base-dialog .resize_input_none {
  resize: none;
  padding: 10px 15px;
}
.resume-base-dialog .resume-base-info-dialog-row {
  width: 100%;
  display: -webkit-box;
  display: -ms-flexbox;
  display: flex;
  -webkit-box-orient: horizontal;
  -webkit-box-direction: normal;
      -ms-flex-direction: row;
          flex-direction: row;
  margin-top: 12px;
}
.resume-base-dialog .resume-base-info-dialog-row > :nth-child(n + 2) {
  margin-left: 14px;
}
.resume-base-dialog .resume-base-info-dialog-row-no-margin {
  position: relative;
  display: -webkit-box;
  display: -ms-flexbox;
  display: flex;
  -webkit-box-orient: horizontal;
  -webkit-box-direction: normal;
      -ms-flex-direction: row;
          flex-direction: row;
  -webkit-box-pack: justify;
      -ms-flex-pack: justify;
          justify-content: space-between;
  margin-top: 12px;
}

}

}

          justify-content: flex-end;

}
.resume-base-dialog .resume-base-dialog-footer .delete-btn {
  cursor: pointer;

</style><style>/**
 * @name: _btn.scss
 * @author: Jostinsu
 * @date: 2018-10-16
 * @description: 按钮
 */
.resume-btn {
  display: inline-block;
  min-width: 74px;
  height: 26px;
  padding: 0 12px;
  font-size: 12px;
  -webkit-box-sizing: border-box;
          box-sizing: border-box;
  line-height: 24px;
  cursor: pointer;
  text-align: center;
  color: var(--base_gray_100);
  border-radius: 2px;
  border: 1px solid var(--base_gray_020);
  background-color: var(--bg_white_web);
  -webkit-user-select: none;
     -moz-user-select: none;
      -ms-user-select: none;
          user-select: none;
  white-space: nowrap;
  -webkit-transition: all 0.2s linear;
  transition: all 0.2s linear;
}
.resume-btn:hover {
  color: var(--base_gray_100);
  border-color: var(--base_gray_050);
  text-decoration: none;
}
.resume-btn:active {
  color: var(--base_gray_100);
  border-color: var(--base_gray_050);
}
.resume-btn.resume-btn_Disabled {
  pointer-events: none;
  color: var(--base_gray_050);
  border-color: var(--base_gray_020);
  cursor: default;
}
.resume-btn_Blue {
  background: var(--theme_primary);
  border: none;
  line-height: 26px;
  color: var(--base_white_100);
}
.resume-btn_Blue:hover {
  color: var(--base_white_100);
  background-color: var(--theme_lighten_1);
}
.resume-btn_Blue:active {
  color: var(--base_white_100);
  background-image: var(--theme_lighten_2);
}
.resume-btn_Blue.resume-btn_Disabled {
  background-color: var(--theme_primary);
  opacity: 0.6;
  cursor: default;
  color: var(--base_white_100);
}
.resume-btn_Big {
  height: 34px;
  line-height: 32px;
  min-width: 80px;
  padding: 0 15px;
  font-size: 14px;
}
.resume-btn_Big.resume-btn_Blue {
  line-height: 34px;
}
.resume-btn_Large {
  height: 38px;
  line-height: 36px;
  min-width: 80px;
  padding: 0 15px;
  font-size: 14px;
}
.resume-btn_Large.resume-btn_Blue {
  line-height: 38px;
}
.resume-btn_Block {
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
}
</style><style>.resume-time-picker {

}

}

  border-bottom-left-radius: inherit;

}

  position: absolute;
  left: 0;
  top: 0;
  right: -17px;
  bottom: 0;
  display: -webkit-box;
  display: -ms-flexbox;
  display: flex;
  -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
  -webkit-box-direction: normal;
      -ms-flex-direction: column;

  width: 92px;

  overflow-x: hidden;
}

      -ms-user-select: none;
          user-select: none;
  cursor: pointer;
}

}

  display: flex;

      -ms-flex-direction: row;
          flex-direction: row;
  -ms-flex-wrap: wrap;
      flex-wrap: wrap;

  height: 200px;
  -ms-flex-line-pack: start;
      align-content: flex-start;

     -moz-user-select: none;
      -ms-user-select: none;

  color: var(--base_gray_100);

.resume-time-picker-popover-wrap .resume-popover-title {
  padding: 0 16px;
  line-height: 32px;

}
.resume-time-picker-popover-wrap .resume-popover-content {
  padding: 8px 16px;

  word-break: break-all;
}
.resume-time-picker-popover-wrap .resume-popover-arrow {
  position: absolute;
  width: 0;

}
.resume-time-picker-popover-wrap .resume-popover-arrow:after {
  content: ' ';

  height: 0;
}
.resume-time-picker-popover-wrap .resume-popover-arrow-top {

  height: 100%;
  width: 100%;

}

}
.resume-upload-image .copper-content {

  position: relative;
  left: 50%;
  top: 50%;
  -webkit-transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
          transform: translate(-50%, -50%);

}

  display: flex;
  -webkit-box-pack: justify;
      -ms-flex-pack: justify;
          justify-content: space-between;
  margin-top: 30px;
  height: 200px;
}
.resume-upload-image .copper-copper {
  left: 0 !important;
  -webkit-transform: translateX(0) !important;
          transform: translateX(0) !important;
  top: 0 !important;
}
.resume-upload-image .copper-preview {
  -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
  -webkit-box-direction: normal;
      -ms-flex-direction: column;

  -webkit-box-pack: center;

}
</style><style>.resume-img-cropper {
  position: relative;
  -webkit-box-sizing: border-box;
          box-sizing: border-box;
  -webkit-user-select: none;
     -moz-user-select: none;
      -ms-user-select: none;
          user-select: none;
  direction: ltr;
  -ms-touch-action: none;
      touch-action: none;
  text-align: left;
  background: var(--bg_white_web);
  top: 15px;
  width: 100%;
  height: 250px;
  left: 50%;
  -webkit-transform: translateX(-50%);
          transform: translateX(-50%);
}
.resume-img-cropper .cropper-box,
.resume-img-cropper .cropper-box-canvas,
.resume-img-cropper .cropper-drag-box,
.resume-img-cropper .cropper-crop-box,
.resume-img-cropper .cropper-face {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  right: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  left: 0;
  -webkit-user-select: none;
     -moz-user-select: none;
      -ms-user-select: none;
          user-select: none;
}
.resume-img-cropper .cropper-box-canvas img {
  position: relative;
  text-align: left;
  -webkit-user-select: none;
     -moz-user-select: none;
      -ms-user-select: none;
          user-select: none;
  -webkit-transform: none;
          transform: none;
  max-width: none;
  max-height: none;
}
.resume-img-cropper .cropper-box {
  overflow: hidden;
}
.resume-img-cropper .cropper-move {
  cursor: move;
}
.resume-img-cropper .cropper-crop {
  cursor: crosshair;
}
.resume-img-cropper .cropper-modal {
  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
}
.resume-img-cropper .cropper-view-box {
  display: block;
  overflow: hidden;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  outline: 1px solid var(--theme_primary);
  outline-color: var(--theme_primary);
  -webkit-user-select: none;
     -moz-user-select: none;
      -ms-user-select: none;
          user-select: none;
}
.resume-img-cropper .cropper-view-box img {
  -webkit-user-select: none;
     -moz-user-select: none;
      -ms-user-select: none;
          user-select: none;
  text-align: left;
  max-width: none;
  max-height: none;
}
.resume-img-cropper .cropper-face {
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  background-color: var(--bg_white_web);
  opacity: 0.1;
}
.resume-img-cropper .crop-info {
  position: absolute;
  left: 0px;
  min-width: 65px;
  text-align: center;
  color: white;
  line-height: 20px;
  background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8);
  font-size: 12px;
}
.resume-img-cropper .crop-line {
  position: absolute;
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  opacity: 0.1;
}
.resume-img-cropper .line-w {
  top: -3px;
  left: 0;
  height: 5px;
  cursor: n-resize;
}
.resume-img-cropper .line-a {
  top: 0;
  left: -3px;
  width: 5px;
  cursor: w-resize;
}
.resume-img-cropper .line-s {
  bottom: -3px;
  left: 0;
  height: 5px;
  cursor: s-resize;
}
.resume-img-cropper .line-d {
  top: 0;
  right: -3px;
  width: 5px;
  cursor: e-resize;
}
.resume-img-cropper .crop-point {
  position: absolute;
  width: 8px;
  height: 8px;
  opacity: 0.75;
  background-color: var(--theme_primary);
  border-radius: 100%;
}
.resume-img-cropper .point1 {
  top: -4px;
  left: -4px;
  cursor: nw-resize;
}
.resume-img-cropper .point2 {
  top: -5px;
  left: 50%;
  margin-left: -3px;
  cursor: n-resize;
}
.resume-img-cropper .point3 {
  top: -4px;
  right: -4px;
  cursor: ne-resize;
}
.resume-img-cropper .point4 {
  top: 50%;
  left: -4px;
  margin-top: -3px;
  cursor: w-resize;
}
.resume-img-cropper .point5 {
  top: 50%;
  right: -4px;
  margin-top: -3px;
  cursor: e-resize;
}
.resume-img-cropper .point6 {
  bottom: -5px;
  left: -4px;
  cursor: sw-resize;
}
.resume-img-cropper .point7 {
  bottom: -5px;
  left: 50%;
  margin-left: -3px;
  cursor: s-resize;
}
.resume-img-cropper .point8 {
  bottom: -5px;
  right: -4px;
  cursor: se-resize;
}
@media screen and (max-width: 500px) {
  .resume-img-cropper .crop-point {
    position: absolute;
    width: 20px;
    height: 20px;
    opacity: 0.45;
    background-color: var(--theme_primary);
    border-radius: 100%;
  }
  .resume-img-cropper .point1 {
    top: -10px;
    left: -10px;
  }
  .resume-img-cropper .point2,
  .resume-img-cropper .point4,
  .resume-img-cropper .point5,
  .resume-img-cropper .point7 {
    display: none;
  }
  .resume-img-cropper .point3 {
    top: -10px;
    right: -10px;
  }
  .resume-img-cropper .point4 {
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
  }
  .resume-img-cropper .point6 {
    bottom: -10px;
    left: -10px;
  }
  .resume-img-cropper .point8 {
    bottom: -10px;
    right: -10px;
  }
}

@-webkit-keyframes drag_item_shake {
  0% {
    -webkit-transform: translate3d(-10%, 0, 0);
            transform: translate3d(-10%, 0, 0);
  }
  50% {
    -webkit-transform: translate3d(10%, 0, 0);
            transform: translate3d(10%, 0, 0);
  }
  100% {
    -webkit-transform: translate3d(0, 0, 0);
            transform: translate3d(0, 0, 0);
  }
}
@keyframes drag_item_shake {
  0% {
    -webkit-transform: translate3d(-10%, 0, 0);
            transform: translate3d(-10%, 0, 0);
  }
  50% {
    -webkit-transform: translate3d(10%, 0, 0);
            transform: translate3d(10%, 0, 0);
  }
  100% {
    -webkit-transform: translate3d(0, 0, 0);
            transform: translate3d(0, 0, 0);
  }
}

0s;animation-fill-mode:forwards}div.semi-input-wrapper{align-items:center;background:var(--bg-base-2);border-radius:12px;display:flex;height:44px}div.semi-input-wrapper .semi-input::-ms-input-placeholder{color:var(--text-caption,#ccc)}div.semi-input-wrapper
